phase: 08 - Site-Scoped Student Directory API and UI
phase7HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 7 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as 3bd47dc feat: add site admin dashboard.

siteSelectionBehavior.multipleAccessibleSites: platform_admin, legacy admin, org_admin, and safely scoped program_teacher users use the documented Desert Valley demo default when accessible; otherwise selectionRequired with accessibleSites

sqlSiteScopingStrategy: Directory scope starts from active selected-site site_users joined to active student accounts and student role memberships.
Program/cohort values are derived through group_memberships, groups, programs, and cohorts.
Mentor coverage is derived from active mentor_assignments for selected-site students.
Latest submission, evidence count, review count, comment count, presentation status, archive status, risk score, and story bucket values are selected only for scoped students.
Tables without site_id are filtered through selected-site student membership instead of global rows.
No legacy global admin, program teacher, mentor, or student dashboard data is reused for /api/site/students.

filterStrategy.search: Sanitized, length-limited search across display name, email, program, and mentor name using bound LIKE parameters.
filterStrategy.noMentor: Boolean active mentor assignment absence filter.
filterStrategy.risk: Derived risk filter for high, medium, low, stale, and no_mentor.
filterStrategy.story: Derived story bucket filter from seeded predictable display-name prefixes.
filterStrategy.presentationStatus: Derived from presentation slot state and outline readiness.
filterStrategy.archiveStatus: Derived from export rows and archive-ready seeded names.
filterStrategy.composition: Filters compose through AND clauses and never widen selected-site scope.
filterStrategy.noMatches: Returns ok true with empty students and filteredTotal 0.

paginationBehavior.returned: Number of rows returned after limit and offset.
paginationBehavior.total: Unfiltered total for the selected site or scoped program population.
paginationBehavior.filteredTotal: Total matching active filters before pagination.
paginationBehavior.requiredWording: Primary site returns exactly 250 total unfiltered matching students, while returned row count respects pagination.

storyBucketStrategy.source: Seeded predictable display-name prefixes documented in docs/demo/story-map.md.

workspaceChanges: Added currentData.siteStudents and loadWorkspaceData fetch for platform_admin, legacy admin, org_admin, site_admin, viewer, and program_teacher roles.
Added Students navigation section with label Students and detail Search and filter capstone progress.

Added route-connected Students render path with site context, metric tiles, filter form, result summary, pagination controls, student rows, story/risk chips, status pills, and empty problem-state detail.
Added disabled Detail view coming soon row control without linking to a nonexistent student detail route.
Dashboard Students metric can open the Students section without pretending student detail exists.

roleAccessMatrix.platform_admin: can view any active site directory
roleAccessMatrix.admin: legacy platform-equivalent compatibility can view any active site directory
roleAccessMatrix.org_admin: can view assigned tenant site directories only
roleAccessMatrix.site_admin: can view assigned site directory only
roleAccessMatrix.viewer: can view assigned site directory read-only with mutation permissions false
roleAccessMatrix.program_teacher: can view only selected-site students in teacher-visible program scope
roleAccessMatrix.misc_admin: 403; aggregate readiness compatibility remains only in /api/reports/readiness

programTeacherScopingBehavior.strategy: Program teacher directory rows are intersected with selected-site student membership and getProgramTeacherScopedStudentIds.
programTeacherScopingBehavior.localProof: IT program teacher sees 45 selected-site IT students, not the full 250-student site or 69-student cross-site IT dashboard population.
programTeacherScopingBehavior.filterOptions: Program teacher filterOptions.programs includes only visible programs.

figmaPatternUsage: Students section renders under the Phase 6.6 product header in renderAppShell.
Rows use workspace-student-directory, workspace-student-row, and workspace-student-card.
Story and risk signals use workspace-story-chip and workspace-risk-chip.
Empty, unavailable, denied, and selection-required states use renderProblemState().
Viewer mode uses the existing product-header read-only marker and workspace-read-only-banner.
localProofUpdates: scripts/prove-local-demo-workspace.mjs now proves /api/site/students primary total 250 with returned rows respecting pagination.

Local proof now verifies secondary total 60, noMentor filter, missing_mentor/revision_requested/archive_failed story filters, Revision Loop Demo search, viewer read-only directory behavior, site-admin cross-site denial, and program-teacher scoped directory behavior.

validation.npm run test: passed; 288 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips
validation.npm run check: passed; aggregate checks and test suite passed
validation.npm run prove:demo:local: passed; proved directory primary total 250, default returned 50, secondary total 60, story filters, search, viewer read-only, site-admin cross-site denial, and program-teacher scoping
validation.git diff --check: passed with CRLF normalization warnings only

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote proof or hosted proof was run.
